title: SoFi Technologies Q2 2025 Earnings Beat
text: SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ: SOFI) delivered strong second-quarter 2025 results that exceeded analyst expectations across key metrics. The fintech company reported revenue of $844.9 million, representing a substantial 44% increase year-over-year. Net income reached $97.3 million, up significantly from the prior year period. The company's profit margin expanded to 12%, compared to just 1.4% in Q2 2024, reflecting improved operational efficiency. Earnings per share came in at $0.088, compared to $0.008 in the comparable quarter last year—an eleven-fold increase. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 6.7% while earnings per share surpassed analyst estimates by 34%. This outperformance demonstrates investor confidence in the company's business model and execution. Looking ahead, the company is positioned for continued growth, with revenue forecast to expand at an 18% annual average over the next three years. This growth trajectory outpaces the broader consumer finance industry projection of 15% annual growth. The market responded positively, with SOFI shares climbing 6.8% over the week following the earnings announcement.
